title: Demonic Sword
body:
Adds a Demonic Sword and the stuff to make it. Right-click with the sword in your hand to spawn fire below you.

You can repair the sword with a Demonic Block.

The ore only spawns in the nether.

Sword Stats:

Attack Speed = 5

Enchantability = 30

Attack Damage = 152

Number Of Uses = 10000
